name: ArcRift
desc: Persistent local memory layer for AI. ArcRift uses a extension and a native MCP server to sync context and decisions from your browser chats (Claude, ChatGPT, …
descFull: Persistent local memory layer for AI. ArcRift uses a extension and a native MCP server to sync context and decisions from your browser chats (Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek) straight to your local IDE agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf)  powered by a local SQLite knowledge graph.
